message:
Add edit_file fuzzy matching and shell description in events

WS7a: When exact string match fails in edit_file, attempt whitespace-
normalized matching using normalizeWS(). Includes note in output when
fuzzy match is used. Non-matching strings still fail.

WS7b: Extract "description" from tool call arguments and promote it to
a top-level field in TOOL_CALL_START events for observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
